reason: Check that ABI boundaries stay in exec IR without adding compute semantics.
Check that runtime ABI metadata remains mirror-only and export preflight fails closed.
Check RVV i64 direct route keeps typed family op and EmitC route authority.
Check scalar i64 fallback source/header/object route contracts and finite family bounds.
Check focused validation uses C++ tests, lit/FileCheck, diff check, and check-tianchenrv.
